// L 
00000000000000000000000000000011  // LB  load byte        |imm.12|rs1.5|001.3|rd.5|0000011.7|
00000000000000000001000000000011  // LH  load half word   |imm.12|rs1.5|100.3|rd.5|0000011.7|
00000000000000000010000000000011  // LW  load word        |imm.12|rs1.5|100.3|rd.5|0000011.7|
00000000000000000100000000000011  // LBU load byte unsign |imm.12|rs1.5|100.3|rd.5|0000011.7|
00000000000000000101000000000011  // LWU load word unsign |imm.12|rs1.5|100.3|rd.5|0000011.7|
